name: codex-hud
description: Local context HUD and compact footer line for Codex CLI sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Show local Codex context and footer status.
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD adds a script-backed skill that summarizes Codex config, git state, project hints, hooks, and runtime context. Standalone commands can render an expanded workspace view; patched Codex TUI mode uses the compact single-line status command.
defaultPrompt: Explain what my Codex HUD is showing.
